description:
Open a new chapter of the beloved series and immerse yourself once again in an atmosphere of warmth, comfort, and peaceful hidden object searching.
Sweet Home: Look and Find 6 is a true soulful retreat, filled with attention to detail and the quiet joy of every found item.

What awaits you in the new game?

Even more hidden object scenes
You’ll explore 18 main hidden object locations and 18 bonus scenes—cozy homes, gardens, verandas, and vivid interiors brimming with detail and mood. Every scene is handcrafted to bring you the feeling of genuine homey warmth.

Your favorite gameplay—perfected
Classic hidden object searching has become even more comfortable and diverse. Relax, explore, and enjoy the process—no rush, no stress.

Mini-games for relaxation and focus
The game includes 11 mini-games and 11 bonus mini-games that gently train your attention and logic. The perfect balance between calm and engaging challenge.

An atmosphere you’ll want to return to
Sweet Home 6 isn’t just a set of levels. It’s a feeling of home, care, and quiet joy. Every moment matters: morning light in the room, carefully arranged objects, and a sense of harmony.

Collector’s Edition includes:
- 18 bonus hidden object scenes
- 11 additional mini-games
- Exclusive content for deeper immersion
- Delightful bonuses for true fans of the series
